chapter1.title: 1. General Provisions
chapter1.content: These General Terms and Conditions (GTC) govern all transactions and services provided by Fairygarden For You. By placing an order or using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

chapter2.title: 2. Products and Services
chapter2.content: We offer handcrafted florariums, DIY kits, workshops, and custom florarium design services. All products are unique and may vary slightly from displayed images due to their handmade nature.

chapter3.title: 3. Ordering and Payment
chapter3.content: Orders can be placed through our website or by contacting us directly. Payment is required at the time of order unless otherwise agreed. We accept major credit cards and bank transfers.

chapter4.title: 4. Delivery and Returns
chapter4.content: Delivery times vary based on product availability and location. Due to the living nature of our products, returns are only accepted for damaged items. Please inspect your order upon delivery and report any issues within 48 hours.

chapter5.title: 5. Custom Order Terms
chapter5.intro: The following terms apply specifically to custom florarium orders:
chapter5.point1: A 30% non-refundable deposit is required to begin work on custom orders. This covers design consultation and initial material procurement.
chapter5.point2: After receiving your deposit, we will contact you within 24 hours to discuss your vision and requirements in detail.
chapter5.point3: Design changes are possible during the consultation phase. Once production begins, major changes may incur additional costs.
chapter5.point4: The final price may vary from the initial estimate based on material availability and design complexity agreed upon during consultation.
chapter5.point5: Custom orders typically take 2-4 weeks to complete. You will be notified when your florarium is ready for pickup or delivery.

chapter6.title: 6. Contact Information
chapter6.content: For any questions regarding these terms, please contact us at contact@fairygarden4u.com or through our website contact form.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Discover the magic behind Fairygarden For You and meet the passionate team bringing enchantment to your world
about.storyParagraph1: Fairygarden For You was born from a simple dream: to bring the enchantment of nature into every home. What started as a small passion project in 2020 has blossomed into a beloved brand, creating handcrafted florariums that capture the magic of miniature worlds.
about.storyParagraph2: Each florarium we create is a labor of love, carefully designed to bring joy and tranquility to your space. We believe that everyone deserves a touch of magic in their lives, and our mission is to make that magic accessible to all.
about.missionText: To inspire wonder and connection with nature through enchanting miniature gardens that transform any space into a magical sanctuary.
about.value1Desc: We use eco-friendly materials and sustainable practices in all our creations.
about.value2Desc: Every florarium is handcrafted with love and attention to detail.
about.value3Desc: We believe in bringing wonder and enchantment to everyday life.

cookies.analyticalDesc: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website (Google Analytics).
